meaning: v.不付足够的工资,不充分地付
examples: The scheme will overpay some lawyers and underpay others.
But employers cheat, too, using creative ways to underpay workers' comp insurance, driving up premiums for other businesses.
This leaves us with a curious problem: we overpay for health care, but we underpay the people we expect to fix it.
Meanwhile, the short form, used by two-thirds of New Mexico taxpayers, contained an incorrect instruction likely to cause most filers to underpay taxes.
